title: OpenAI raises over $4 billion for new enterprise deployment venture
what_happened: OpenAI has raised more than $4 billion for a new joint venture called "The Deployment Company," according to Bloomberg. The article OpenAI raises over $4 billion for new enterprise deployment venture appeared first on The Decoder.

title: Greg Brockman Defends $30B OpenAI Stake: ‘Blood, Sweat, and Tears’
what_happened: OpenAI’s cofounder and president revealed in federal court on Monday that he’s one of the largest individual stakeholders in the AI lab.

title: Physical AI raises governance questions for autonomous systems
what_happened: Governance around Physical AI is becoming harder as autonomous AI systems move into robots, sensors, and industrial equipment. The issue is not only whether AI agents can complete tasks. It is how their actions are tested, monitored, and stopped when they interact with real-world systems. title: Google made agentic AI governance a product. Enterprises still have to catch up.
what_happened: Two weeks ago at Google Cloud Next ’26 in Las Vegas, Google did something the enterprise AI industry has been dancing around for the better part of two years: it made agentic AI governance a native product feature, not an afterthought.
